name: Walker Crips Group plc
summary: Walker Crips Group plc provides financial services in the United Kingdom. It operates through three segments: Investment Management, Wealth Management, and Software as a Service (SaaS) segments. The company offers portfolio and bespoke discretionary services; alternative investment solutions; structured investments products; and provides advice on range of financial concerns, such as life assurance, pre-retirement planning, at-retirement advice, savings plans, tax efficient management of investments, and estate planning. It also provides self-invested personal pension products and small self-administered schemes; advisory and administrative services to clients for financial planning, life insurance, inheritance tax, and pension arrangements; and cloud-based regulatory software to financial services firms. In addition, the company is involved in provision of management, pensions management, financial regulation, nominee, and stockbroking agency services. Walker Crips Group plc was founded in 1914 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
